sections.heading: About the Roadhouse
body: The Rio Nido Roadhouse sits in the heart of the redwoods in the Russian River resort area, where bands have played for decades. For 14 years, owners Raena and Brad Jones Metzger have kept the tradition going with classic pub fare, craft cocktails, and a roster of mostly locally brewed beers.

It is equal parts restaurant, music venue, and summer hangout: great American pub food and daily specials, live music on the weekends, and a swimming pool that makes it a Russian River favorite all season long.

items.title: A Russian River Institution
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.title: 15 Craft Beers On Tap
items.body: Made with care and real ingredients — quality you can taste.

items.title: Live Music Every Weekend
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.
